text:
Athens Times

—

Sophia Malcogeorgou and Sofia made an impressive appearance in the free duet of artistic swimming and eventually took 6th place in the . With 281,8418 points in the free program, Evangelia Plataniotis and Sophia Malkogeorgou reached 532,3002 points in total and managed to finish in 6th place, in the duo of artistic swimming at the 2024 Olympics. The two Greek women were particularly moved to hear their score, which temporarily brought them into the medals, before they ended up sixth, after 8th place in the technical program. 4th place was left the Alexandris sisters representing Austria.

Athens Times

News about Greece and the World.
title: Evangelia Plataniotis and Sophia Malcogeorgou stayed in 6th place in the duo of artistic swimming at the 2024 Olympics - Athens Times
